articles.title: Citi Strata Elite Credits Are Easy To Use — Here's How To Max Them Out
articles.summary: The Strata Elite's $300 hotel and $300 dining credits are surprisingly easy to use — here's how to pocket full year-one value without stress.

articles.title: AT&T Points Plus Card Refresh: More Points, More Perks
articles.summary: Citi refreshed the AT&T Points Plus card with 2X ThankYou Points on AT&T purchases plus monthly bill discounts worth up to $240/year.

articles.title: Citibank's Strata Elite Card Has A 100,000 Point Bonus — And Earns More American Miles Than AA's Cards
articles.summary: Citi Strata Elite bumped its welcome offer to 100K points and earns more AA miles per dollar than AA's own cards. $595 annual fee.

articles.title: Amex Is Offering Some Business Platinum Cardholders Nearly 1 Million Points To Keep Spending
articles.summary: Select Amex Business Platinum holders are targeted for a tiered spending offer worth up to 954K Membership Rewards points by July 2026.

articles.title: From Included Breakfast To Award Nights: Why This Marriott Credit Card Is Worth Thousands To Me Every Year
articles.summary: All three Marriott Amex cards are at best-ever welcome bonuses — the Brilliant reaches 200K points after $6K spend, ending May 13.

articles.title: Bank of America & Alaska Air Announce Expansion Of Partnership (New Cards/Refreshes?)
articles.summary: BofA and Alaska extended their Atmos Rewards co-brand deal, hinting at new card launches and bigger lounge investments in the program ahead.

articles.title: Alaska & Bank Of America Expand Partnership: New Credit Cards & Perks
articles.summary: Alaska and Bank of America extended their Atmos Rewards co-brand deal — expect new card launches and bigger lounge investments ahead.

articles.title: 25% Transfer Bonus From Citi to Leaders Hotels of the World Leaders Club
articles.summary: Citi ThankYou transfers to Leading Hotels of the World get a 25% boost through May 16 — effectively 4:1 instead of the normal 5:1.

articles.title: (Reminder) Ouch: Citi Decreasing Transfer Ratio To Choice Privileges And Preferred Hotels iPrefer On 4/19/26
articles.summary: Citi devalued transfer ratios to Choice Privileges and Preferred Hotels iPrefer on April 19 — your ThankYou Points now go less far at both.

articles.title: Transfer Citi Points To Leading Hotels Of The World With 25% Bonus: Worth It?
articles.summary: Citi transfers to LHW Leaders Club carry a 25% bonus through May 16 — yields ~2 cents per ThankYou point at the right luxury hotel.

articles.title: Atmos Summit Card: Maximize Rewards For International Travelers
articles.summary: The Atmos Rewards Summit earns more points on overseas purchases than most airline cards — a strong pick if you spend heavily outside the US.

articles.title: New Chase Sapphire Reserve Perk Is Live — $75,000 Spend Now Includes Hyatt Explorist Status
articles.summary: Chase Sapphire Reserve's promised Hyatt Explorist perk is now active — link your Hyatt account and $75K in annual spend earns you mid-tier status.

articles.title: (Increased) Rakuten Offering Bonus Cashback/Rewards On Select Bank Of America Credit Cards
articles.summary: Rakuten bumped its BofA Travel Rewards signup bonus to $250/25K points — stack it on top of the card's own welcome offer for max value.

articles.title: [Ends Soon] Best-Ever 200,000-Point IHG Business Card Bonus
articles.summary: IHG Premier Business card is back to its all-time-high 200K-point offer — 140K after $4K spend, then 60K more — ending April 30.

articles.title: [Ends Soon] Hyatt Business Card Record 80,000 Points — The Fastest Way To Spend Toward Status
articles.summary: Hyatt Business card's record 80K-point bonus is also the fastest route to Globalist status — expires April 30, so act fast.

articles.title: World Of Hyatt Business Card 80K Bonus Points Limited Time Offer
articles.summary: Hyatt Business card hits a record 80K-point offer after $10K spend — best ever on this card, ending April 30.

articles.title: JetBlue Premier Card Adds Companion Credits, Mosaic Boost, Award Rebate
articles.summary: JetBlue Premier card adds companion credits up to $2K/year, a 25-tile Mosaic status boost, and a 15% award rebate — no annual fee increase.

articles.title: Hidden, Targeted Spending Offers On Cobranded Barclays Cards: Get 5 Or 10 Extra Points Per Dollar
articles.summary: JetBlue, Hawaiian, and Frontier Barclays cardholders may have hidden Q2 bonuses worth +5–10 points per dollar — log in to claim yours.

articles.title: Good News: $95 Capital One Venture Business Card Replaces Spark Miles
articles.summary: Capital One is rebranding Spark Miles to Venture Business — same $95 fee and 2X on travel, just unified with the personal Venture lineup.

articles.title: Great Value From the Best AAdvantage Business Card Offer — 75,000 Miles
articles.summary: Citi's AAdvantage Business card returns to its best-ever 75K-mile offer with the first year's $99 fee waived — a limited-time combination.

articles.title: Chase Ultimate Rewards To IHG One Rewards 70% Transfer Bonus
articles.summary: Chase Ultimate Rewards is offering a 70% transfer bonus to IHG One Rewards through April 30 — biggest boost available to IHG right now.

articles.title: Citi Expands Premium Dining Experience For Strata Elite Card Holders
articles.summary: Citi's Supper Club dining series for Strata Elite cardholders is expanding to 5 more US cities in 2026, starting with Miami this April.

articles.title: Get Up To A 30% Bonus On Chase Transfers To Aeroplan
articles.summary: Chase Ultimate Rewards cardholders get a 20% transfer bonus to Air Canada Aeroplan through April 30 — Aeroplan cardholders can stack up to 30%.

articles.title: Chase Q2 Cobranded Card Spending Offers With Direct Registration Links
articles.summary: Chase Q2 targeted spending bonuses for Southwest, United, Marriott, and Disney cards are live — up to 12K bonus points through June 30.
